tasks.label: Setup venv and install requirements
tasks.command: export PYENV_ROOT="$HOME/.pyenv"; export PATH="$PYENV_ROOT/bin:$PYENV_ROOT/shims:$PATH"; eval "$(pyenv init -)"; pyenv local 3.11.9; PY_CMD="$(pyenv which python)"; TARGET_MM="$($PY_CMD -c 'import sys; print(f"{sys.version_info.major}.{sys.version_info.minor}")')"; NEED_REBUILD=0; if [ "$TARGET_MM" != "3.11" ]; then echo "Python 3.11 is required, got $TARGET_MM"; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -x .venv/bin/python ]; then NEED_REBUILD=1; else VENV_MM="$(./.venv/bin/python -c 'import sys; print(f"{sys.version_info.major}.{sys.version_info.minor}")')"; if [ "$VENV_MM" != "3.11" ]; then NEED_REBUILD=1; fi; fi; if [ "$NEED_REBUILD" -eq 1 ]; then "$PY_CMD" -m venv --clear .venv; fi; ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip; ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt; ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install litellm openai

tasks.label: Start LiteLLM Proxy
tasks.command: if curl -fsS http://localhost:4000/v1/models >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'LiteLLM already running'; sleep 86400; else ./.venv/bin/litellm --config core/config/litellm.config.yaml --port 4000; fi

background.endsPattern: LiteLLM already running|Application startup complete|Uvicorn running|Running on

tasks.label: Ensure Ollama Server
tasks.command: if curl -fsS http://localhost:11434/api/tags >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Ollama already running'; else ollama serve >/tmp/cerehub-ollama.log 2>&1 & for i in $(seq 1 30); do curl -fsS http://localhost:11434/api/tags >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'Ollama started' && exit 0; sleep 1; done; echo 'Ollama did not become ready. See /tmp/cerehub-ollama.log'; exit 1; fi

tasks.label: Ensure local-intent model
tasks.command: ollama list | grep -E '^qwen3:4b[[:space:]]' >/dev/null 2>&1 || ollama pull qwen3:4b
